allow: Bash(npx ts-node --compiler-options '{""strict"":false}' -e "var yaml = require\(''js-yaml''\); var fs = require\(''fs''\); var parser = require\(''./src/parser''\); var doc = yaml.load\(fs.readFileSync\(''cassandra-openapi.yaml'', ''utf-8''\)\); var result = parser.parseSpec\(doc\); var v = result.vocabulary; var domainEvts = v.events.filter\(function\(e\) { return e.trigger_type !== ''audit'' && e.trigger_type !== ''state_transition''; }\); domainEvts.slice\(0,40\).forEach\(function\(e\) { console.log\(e.name + ''|'' + e.trigger_type + ''|'' + e.source_entity\); }\); console.log\(''Total domain:'', domainEvts.length\);")
